seoTitle: Innes Park vs Innisfail Estate — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Innes Park and Innisfail Estate. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Innes Park vs Innisfail Estate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Innes Park and Innisfail Estate.
heading: Innes Park vs Innisfail Estate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Innes Park, Queensland and Innisfail Estate, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Innisfail Estate has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Innes Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Innes Park or Innisfail Estate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Innes Park has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Innisfail Estate scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Innes Park scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Innisfail Estate scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Innes Park or Innisfail Estate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Innisfail Estate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
